description: Graphic built from a screenshot of a CNN article header with red highlight boxes added over parts of the text. The screenshot reproduces a CNN web layout: the CNN logo, a hamburger menu, a red 'Subscribe' button at top, a 'US | 3 MIN READ' kicker, the byline 'By Taylor Romine' with a CNN avatar, and a '22 HR AGO' timestamp. The black headline on white includes the words 'ICE', 'in Maryland who', and 'attempted to ram them with his van'. Bright red boxes with white text are placed over parts of the headline reading 'officers defended themselves' and 'from a criminal illegal alien', and a red block covers wording before 'attempted to ram them'. The tweet text reads 'Fixed the headline for you, @CNN.'
notable_text: CNN US; ICE officers defended themselves from a criminal illegal alien in Maryland who attempted to ram them with his van; By Taylor Romine; 22 HR AGO
